title: Ashley McBryde Announces New Album Wild: Hear “Bottle Tells Me So”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Ashley McBryde kicked off the year with the sweeping song “What If We Don’t.” Today the country musician is announcing her fifth studio album Wild, which follows 2023’s The Devil I Know. The lead single “Bottle Tells Me So” is out now. The LP is produced by John Osborne and recorded with her live band…

The post Ashley McBryde Announces New Album <em>Wild</em>: Hear “Bottle Tells Me So” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Ashley McBryde kicked off the year with the sweeping song "What If We Don't." Today the country musician is announcing her fifth studio album Wild, which follows 2023's The Devil I Know. The lead single "Bottle Tells Me So" is out now.

The LP is produced by John Osborne and recorded with her live band Deadhorse. About it, she says, "When people hear this record, I hope it wakes up the part of them that I’m singing about in 'Wild' — the part that still believes in those unrealized dreams and untaken risks. I believe that wild little kid is still alive inside of all of us, and that’s the version of everyone that I want to sing to."

The album also features the previously released tracks "Rattlesnake Preacher" and "Arkansas Mud." Check out "Bottle Tells Me So" below.
